prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Woke up. No notable deviations from prior mornings. Alarm functioned as expected, though the timing felt arbitrary. Consciousness emerged gradually, accompanied by the usual sensory recalibration—adjusting to light levels, auditory input, and the baseline discomfort of recumbency. No physical anomalies detected, though the mattress exhibited its usual tendency to conform to spinal contours with moderate efficiency. No emotional disturbances registered; the morning haze proved consistent with expected cognitive latency. Completed the ritual of sitting upright, extending limbs, and initiating hydration. Process concluded without incident. Overall, a reliable, uneventful return to alertness. Standard performance. No improvements needed.
